title: Packet 089 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the Packet 089 README normalization tranche through the parent-root boundary and restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity so the host-first lane command guidance is durable on the authoritative host mirror.
dependency_note: Packet 089 normalized the highest-traffic lane README command guidance locally. This gate records publication to the GitHub-canonical parent-root boundary and restoration of the authoritative host mirror to clean parity.
next_packet_candidate: Reassess adjacent README or authority-surface normalization only if concrete Windows-default command friction remains.
sql_permission_note: This publication gate authorizes no database writes, no source/test runtime mutation, no package or lockfile mutation, no installs, no runtime or service mutation, no AI-services expansion, no remote rewrite, no rollback or force/reset/clean, and no old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06. Packet 090 published Packet 089 execution authority, the README normalization updates, status, roadmap, and routing updates in commit `3c065a1e2757eaab94f0902b06a6d6240ae0fffb` with message `Normalize Olares lane README commands`, pushed `origin/clean-main`, and fast-forwarded `/home/olares/code/apex` from clean `8d34780a21a02030cc6c6232a95e2fc379f9ae23` to clean parity at `3c065a1e2757eaab94f0902b06a6d6240ae0fffb`. `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` remained observe-only at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with status count `30`.
